name: Tivic Health Systems, Inc.
summary: PART I As used in this Report, unless the context otherwise requires, references to we, us, our, Company, Tivic, and Tivic Health refer to Tivic Health Systems, Inc, collectively with its subsidiary, on a consolidated basis. Business Overview Tivic Health Systems, Inc. is a late-stage biopharmaceutical company whose lead program is Entolimod.
